final_prompt.prompt:
Create an Instagram-style smartphone photo of a trendy Korean cafe scene featuring coffee and desserts, with meaningful hand-drawn annotations added to each element.

Style/medium: needs a Korean cafe aesthetic with Instagram story / magazine rough-note style — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be smartphone-camera framing, no human subjects visible
Subject: must include fashionable coffee beverage and dessert items arranged aesthetically
Scene/backdrop: must include Korean cafe interior context
Lighting/mood: needs a bright, airy, Instagram-worthy atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a trendy, warm cafe direction — exact hex values are yours
Materials/textures: needs a hand-drawn annotation overlay with thin white pen lines, rough uneven single-stroke style, outline tracing around objects, arrows and dashed lines for visual guidance — exact stroke weight is yours
Text (verbatim): must include Japanese handwritten text (70% hiragana, 30% simple kanji), short diary-style commentary with emotional tone, covering: drink taste/temperature/mood (e.g., 清爽、温柔的甜味), food texture/deliciousness (e.g., 湿润、最高), space atmosphere (e.g., 放松、美好时光), overall summary (e.g., 幸福过头了～)
Constraints: must preserve Korean cafe aesthetic base, annotations must be thin white hand-drawn lines with rough uneven single-stroke quality, must include steam/sparkles/hearts/small emoticons moderately with intentional negative space, must avoid overcrowding
Avoid: must avoid human subjects, must avoid over-decoration losing the "blank space" quality
